## What does this change?

<!-- One sentence. What skill is being added or changed, and why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `name` field in frontmatter matches the folder name exactly
- [ ] `description` is activation-trigger language (says *when* to invoke, not what the skill is)
- [ ] `metadata.version` bumped if editing an existing skill
- [ ] `examples/` has at least one concrete input → output example
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] CI validation passes (frontmatter check)
